messages.text:
Status: 
Awaiting the price quote from Inbra. Their material has been tested satisfactorly (Michael). We will determine the logistics stream once quoted and assess overall timing. 
Need to confirm terms with Inbra. 

CHS is < 3 weeks leadtime, but pricing seems high 

I want to be able to come back to CB early next.

For record keeping, this was the NMR analysis that we did based on the samples Chris provided from Inbra some time ago. It's also in the core team folder here: <https://drive.google.com/open?id=1IvbVcJI1mMRq0lTOW11imCVREQjZOJgF&usp=drive_fs>
